name: meta
desc: app metadata

name: oauth
desc: oauth related classes for io versus browser usage

name: yt
desc:
The YouTube Live Streaming API reference explains how to schedule live broadcasts and video streams
on YouTube using the YouTube Live Streaming API.

name: AuthorChannelId
desc: This object encapsulates information about the comment author's YouTube channel, if available.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc: The ID of the comment author's YouTube channel, if available.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Broadcast
desc: A liveBroadcast resource represents an event that will be streamed, via live video, on YouTube.

name: bind
desc: Binds a YouTube broadcast to a stream or removes an existing binding between a broadcast and a stream. A broadcast can only be bound to one video stream, though a video stream may be bound to more than one broadcast.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a broadcast.

name: insert
desc: Creates a broadcast.

name: list
desc: Returns a list of YouTube broadcasts that match the API request parameters.

name: transition
desc: Changes the status of a YouTube live broadcast and initiates any processes associated with the new status. For example, when you transition a broadcast's status to testing, YouTube starts to transmit video to that broadcast's monitor stream. Before calling this method, you should confirm that the value of the LiveBroadcastItem.status property for the stream bound to your broadcast is active.

name: update
desc: Updates a broadcast. For example, you could modify the broadcast settings defined in the LiveBroadcastItem resource's LiveBroadcastItem.contentDetails object.

name: ChannelItem
desc: A channel resource contains information about a YouTube channel.

name: brandingSettings
desc: The BrandingSettings object encapsulates information about the branding of the channel.

name: contentDetails
desc: The ContentDetails object encapsulates information about the channel's content.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the channel

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The Snippet object contains basic details about the channel, such as its title, description, and thumbnail images.

name: statistics
desc: The Statistics object encapsulates statistics for the channel.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: ChannelResponse
desc: A channel resource contains information about a YouTube channel.

name: channelItems
desc:
Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#channelListResponse.
A list of channels that match the request criteria.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: list
desc: Returns a collection of zero or more channel resources that match the request criteria.

name: update
desc: Modifies a Channels For example, you could change a Channels title, description, or privacy status.

name: Chat
desc: A liveChatMessage resource represents a chat message in a YouTube live chat. The resource can contain details about several types of messages, including a newly posted text message or fan funding event.

name: answerBot
desc: Use a Chatbot to answer questions in the liveChat.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a chat message. The API request must be authorized by the channel owner or a moderator of the live chat.

name: downloadHistory
desc:
Download the liveChat history.  If a File is specified then the data will
be stored there otherwise if a TimeStore is specified, only history with a
timestamp greater than that given by the TimeStore will be downloaded.

name: insert
desc: Adds a message to a live chat.

name: list
desc: Lists live chat messages for a specific chat.

name: send
desc: Send a message to the liveChat session.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CommentListResponse
desc: A comment resource contains information about a single YouTube comment. A comment resource can represent a comment about either a video or a channel. In addition, the comment could be a top-level comment or a reply to a top-level comment.

name: commentItems
desc: A list of comments that match the request criteria.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CommentThreadListResponse
desc: A comment resource contains information about a single YouTube comment. A comment resource can represent a comment about either a video or a channel. In addition, the comment could be a top-level comment or a reply to a top-level comment.

name: commentThreadItems
desc: A list of comments that match the request criteria.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: add
desc: Helper method that creates a new top-level comment thread.

name: insert
desc:
Creates a new top-level comment. To add a reply to an existing comment,
use the comments.insert method instead.

name: list
desc: Returns a list of comment threads that match the API request parameters.

name: listByChannelId
desc:
The channelId parameter instructs the API to return all
comment threads associated with the specified channel.

name: listById
desc:
The id parameter specifies a comment thread ID for the resource that
should be retrieved.

name: listByIds
desc:
The ids parameter specifies a list of comment thread IDs for the
resources that should be retrieved.

name: listByVideoId
desc: Returns a list of comment threads for the provided videoID.

name: add
desc: Helper method that creates a new top-level comment.

name: change
desc: Helper method to modify a comment.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a comment.

name: insert
desc:
Creates a reply to an existing comment. Note: To create a top-level
comment, use the commentThreads.insert method or commentThreads.add helper
method.

name: list
desc: Returns a list of comments that match the API request parameters.

name: listById
desc:
The id parameter specifies a comment ID for the resource that is being
retrieved. In a comment resource, the id property specifies the comment's
ID.

name: listByIds
desc:
The id parameter specifies a comma-separated list of comment IDs for the
resources that are being retrieved. In a comment resource, the id property
specifies the comment's ID.

name: listByParentId
desc:
The parentId parameter specifies the ID of the comment for which replies
should be retrieved.

name: setModerationStatus
desc:
Sets the moderation status of one or more comments. The API request
must be authorized by the owner of the channel or video associated
with the comments.

name: update
desc: Modifies a comment.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LiveBroadcastItem
desc: LiveBroadcastItem Resource

name: compareTo
desc: Compares this object to another object.

name: contentDetails
desc: The ContentDetails object contains information about the event's video content, such as whether the content can be shown in an embedded video player or if it will be archived and therefore available for viewing after the event has concluded.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the broadcast.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The Snippet object contains basic details about the event, including its Snippet.title, Snippet.description, Snippet.scheduledStartTime, and Snippet.scheduledEndTime.

name: statistics
desc: The Statistics object contains statistics related to a live broadcast. The values for these statistics can change during the broadcast and can only be retrieved while the broadcast is live.

name: status
desc: The Status object contains information about the event's status.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LiveBroadcastResponse
desc: LiveBroadcastResponse

name: broadcastItems
desc: A list of broadcasts that match the request criteria.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LiveChatMessage
desc: A liveChatMessage resource represents a chat message in a YouTube live chat. The resource can contain details about several types of messages, including a newly posted text message or fan funding event.

name: authorDetails
desc: The authorDetails object contains additional details about the user that posted this message.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the message.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The snippet object contains core details about the chat message.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LiveChatMessageListResponse
desc: A liveChatMessage resource represents a chat message in a YouTube live chat. The resource can contain details about several types of messages, including a newly posted text message or fan funding event.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: liveChatMessageItems
desc: A list of live chat messages. Each item in the list is a liveChatMessage resource.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: offlineAt
desc: The date and time when the underlying live stream went offline. This property is only present if the stream is already offline. The value is specified in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ) format.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: pollingIntervalMillis
desc: The amount of time, in milliseconds, that the client should wait before polling again for new live chat messages.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LiveStream
desc: A liveStream resource contains information about the video stream that you are transmitting to YouTube. The stream provides the content that will be broadcast to YouTube users. Once created, a LiveStreamItem resource can be bound to one or more LiveBroadcastItem resources.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a video stream.

name: insert
desc: Creates a video stream. The stream enables you to send your video to YouTube, which can then broadcast the video to your audience.

name: list
desc: Returns a list of video streams that match the API request parameters.

name: update
desc: Updates a video stream. If the properties that you want to change cannot be updated, then you need to create a new stream with the proper settings.

name: LiveStreamItem
desc: A liveStream resource contains information about the video stream that you are transmitting to YouTube. The stream provides the content that will be broadcast to YouTube users. Once created, a liveStream resource can be bound to one or more liveBroadcast resources.

name: cdn
desc: The cdn object defines the live stream's content delivery network (CDN) settings. These settings provide details about the manner in which you stream your content to YouTube.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the stream.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The snippet object contains basic details about the stream, including its channel, title, and description.

name: status
desc: The status object contains information about live stream's status.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: liveStreamItems
desc: A list of live streams that match the request criteria.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LoggingInterceptors
desc:
Dio instance may have one or more interceptors by which you can intercept
requests/responses/errors before they are handled by then or catchError.

name: onError
desc: The callback will be executed on error.

name: onRequest
desc: The callback will be executed before the request is initiated.

name: onResponse
desc: The callback will be executed on success.

name: ModerationStatus
desc: Identifies the new moderation status of the specified comments.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Playlist
desc: A playlist resource represents a YouTube playlist. A playlist is a collection of videos that can be viewed sequentially and shared with other users. By default, playlists are publicly visible to other users, but playlists can be public or private.

name: contentDetails
desc: The ContentDetails object contains information about the playlist content, including the number of videos in the playlist.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the playlist.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: localizations
desc: The localizations object encapsulates translations of the playlist's metadata.

name: player
desc: The Player object contains information that you would use to play the playlist in an embedded player.

name: snippet
desc: The Snippet object contains basic details about the playlist, such as its title and description.

name: status
desc: The Status object contains status information for the playlist.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: PlaylistItem
desc: A playlistItem resource identifies another resource, such as a video, that is included in a playlist. In addition, the playlistItem resource contains details about the included resource that pertain specifically to how that resource is used in that playlist.

name: contentDetails
desc: The ContentDetails object is included in the resource if the included item is a YouTube video. The object contains additional information about the video.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the playlist.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The Snippet object contains basic details about the playlist item, such as its title and position in the playlist.

name: status
desc: The Status object contains information about the playlist item's privacy status.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: PlaylistItemListResponse
desc: A collection of playlist items that match the API request parameters. You can retrieve all of the playlist items in a specified playlist or retrieve one or more playlist items by their unique IDs. Try it now.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: playlistItemItems
desc: A list of playlist items that match the request criteria.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a playlist.

name: insert
desc: Creates a playlist.

name: list
desc: Returns a collection of playlists that match the API request parameters. For example, you can retrieve all playlists that the authenticated user owns, or you can retrieve one or more playlists by their unique IDs.

name: update
desc: Modifies a playlist. For example, you could change a playlist's title, description, or privacy status.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: playlistItems
desc: A list of playlists that match the request criteria.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Playlists
desc: A playlist resource represents a YouTube playlist. A playlist is a collection of videos that can be viewed sequentially and shared with other users. By default, playlists are publicly visible to other users, but playlists can be public or private.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a playlist.

name: insert
desc: Creates a playlist.

name: list
desc:
Returns a collection of playlists that match the API request parameters.
For example, you can retrieve all playlists that the authenticated user
owns, or you can retrieve one or more playlists by their unique IDs.

name: update
desc: Modifies a playlist. For example, you could change a playlist's title, description, or privacy status.

name: Position
desc:
The position object encapsulates information about the spatial position
within the video where the watermark image will display.

name: cornerPosition
desc: The corner of the player where the promoted item will appear. The item always appears in the upper right corner of the player.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: type
desc: The manner in which the promoted item is positioned in the video player.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: ReportAbuse
desc: Reports a video for containing abusive content.

name: comments
desc: Provides any additional information that the reporter wants to add.

name: language
desc: Identifies a language spoken by the reporter.

name: reasonId
desc: Specifies the reason that the video that is being reported for containing abusive content. Set the value to the appropriate videoAbuseReportReason resource's unique ID.

name: secondaryReasonId
desc: Specifies the secondary reason that the video that is being reported for containing abusive content. A secondary reason provides a more specific description of the objectionable content than the primary reason, which the reasonId property identifies. Set the value to the appropriate secondary reason's unique ID.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: videoId
desc: Identifies the video that is being reported for containing abusive content. Set the value to that video's YouTube video ID.

name: Search
desc: A search result contains information about a YouTube video, channel, or playlist that matches the search parameters specified in an API request. While a search result points to a uniquely identifiable resource, like a video, it does not have its own persistent data.

name: list
desc: Returns a collection of search results that match the query parameters specified in the API request. By default, a search result set identifies matching video, channel, and Playlist resources, but you can also configure queries to only retrieve a specific type of resource.

name: SearchListResponse
desc: Returns a collection of search results that match the query parameters specified in the API request. By default, a search result set identifies matching video, channel, and playlist resources, but you can also configure queries to only retrieve a specific type of resource.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: regionCode
desc: The region code that was used for the search query. The property value is a two-letter ISO country code that identifies the region. The i18nRegions.list method returns a list of supported regions. The default value is US. If a non-supported region is specified, YouTube might still select another region, rather than the default value, to handle the query.

name: searchItems
desc: A list of results that match the search criteria.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SearchResult
desc: a collection of search results that match the query parameters specified in the API request. By default, a search result set identifies matching video, channel, and playlist resources, but you can also configure queries to only retrieve a specific type of resource.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The id object contains information that can be used to uniquely identify the resource that matches the search request.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The snippet object contains basic details about a search result, such as its title or description. For example, if the search result is a video, then the title will be the video's title and the description will be the video's description.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Status
desc: The status object contains information about the event's status.

name: lifeCycleStatus
desc: The broadcast's status. The status can be updated using the API's liveBroadcasts.transition method.

name: madeForKids
desc: This value indicates whether the broadcast is designated as child-directed. This property value is read-only.

name: privacyStatus
desc: The broadcast's privacy status. Note that the broadcast represents exactly one YouTube video, so the privacy settings are identical to those supported for videos. In addition, you can set this field by modifying the broadcast resource or by setting the privacyStatus field of the corresponding video resource.

name: recordingStatus
desc: The broadcast's recording status.

name: selfDeclaredMadeForKids
desc: In a Broadcast.insert request, this property allows the channel owner to designate the broadcast as being child-directed. In a Broadcast.list request, the property value is only returned if the channel owner authorized the API request.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Subscription
desc:
A Subscription resource contains information about a YouTube user
subscription. A subscription notifies a user when new videos are added to a
channel or when another user takes one of several actions on YouTube, such
as uploading a video, rating a video, or commenting on a video.

name: contentDetails
desc: The ContentDetails object contains basic statistics about the subscription.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the Subscription.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: snippet
desc: The Snippet object contains basic details about the subscription, including its title and the channel that the user subscribed to.

name: subscriberSnippet
desc: The SubscriberSnippet object contains basic details about the subscriber.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SubscriptionListResponse
desc: Returns subscription resources that match the API request criteria.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: subscriptionItems
desc: A list of subscriptions that match the request criteria.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Subscriptions
desc:
A subscription resource contains information about a YouTube user
subscription. A subscription notifies a user when new videos are added to a
channel or when another user takes one of several actions on YouTube, such
as uploading a video, rating a video, or commenting on a video.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a subscription.

name: insert
desc: Adds a subscription for the authenticated user's channel.

name: list
desc: Returns subscription resources that match the API request criteria.

name: Thumbnail
desc: A map of thumbnail images associated with the broadcast. For each nested object in this object, the key is the name of the thumbnail image, and the value is an object that contains other information about the thumbnail.

name: height
desc: The image's height.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: url
desc: The image's URL.

name: width
desc: The image's width.

name: Thumbnails
desc: A Thumbnail resource identifies different thumbnail image sizes associated with a resource. Please note the following characteristics of thumbnail images:

name: set
desc: Supply the videoId and retrieve the url used to upload the thumbnail image

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Timing
desc:
The timing object encapsulates information about the time during a video
playback when a channel's watermark image will display.

name: durationMs
desc:
The length of time, in milliseconds, that the watermark image should
display.

name: offsetMs
desc:
The time offset, specified in milliseconds, that determines when the
promoted item appears during video playbacks. The type property's value
determines whether the offset is measured from the start or end of the
video.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: type
desc:
The timing method that determines when the watermark image is displayed
during the video playback. If the value is offsetFromStart, then the
offsetMs field represents an offset from the start of the video. If the
value is offsetFromEnd, then the offsetMs field represents an offset from
the end of the video.

name: VideoCategories
desc: Returns a list of VideoItems that match the API request parameters.

name: VideoCategories.new
desc:
A videoCategory resource identifies a category that has been or could be
associated with uploaded videos.

name: list
desc:
Retrieves a list of categories that can be associated with YouTube videos
in the United States. The regionCode parameter specifies the country for
which categories are being retrieved.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: videoCategoryItems
desc: A list of video categories that can be associated with YouTube videos. In this map, the video category ID is the map key, and its value is the corresponding videoCategory resource.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: ratingItems
desc: A list of ratings that match the request criteria.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: VideoItem
desc: A video resource represents a YouTube video.

name: contentDetails
desc: The contentDetails object contains information about the video content, including the length of the video and an indication of whether captions are available for the video.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: id
desc: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the video.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: player
desc: The player object contains information that you would use to play the video in an embedded player.

name: snippet
desc: The snippet object contains basic details about the video, such as its title, description, and category.

name: statistics
desc: The statistics object contains statistics about the video.

name: status
desc: The status object contains information about the video's uploading, processing, and privacy statuses.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: VideoListResponse
desc: Retrieves the ratings that the authorized user gave to a list of specified videos.

name: etag
desc: The Etag of this resource.

name: kind
desc: Identifies the API resource's type. The value will be youtube#searchListResponse.

name: nextPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page in the result set.

name: pageInfo
desc: The pageInfo object encapsulates paging information for the result set.

name: prevPageToken
desc: The token that can be used as the value of the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page in the result set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: videoItems
desc: A list of videos that match the request criteria.

name: Videos
desc: Returns a list of VideoItems that match the API request parameters.

name: delete
desc: Deletes a YouTube video.

name: getRating
desc: Retrieves the ratings that the authorized user gave to a list of specified videos.

name: insert
desc: Uploads a video to YouTube and optionally sets the video's metadata.

name: list
desc: Uploads a VideoItem to YouTube and optionally sets the video's metadata.

name: rate
desc: Add a like or dislike rating to a VideoItem or remove a rating from a VideoItem.

name: reportAbuse
desc: Report a video for containing abusive content.

name: update
desc: Updates a VideoItem's metadata.

name: Watermarks
desc:
A Watermarks resource identifies an image that displays during playbacks of
a specified channel's videos. You can also specify a target channel to which
the image will link as well as timing details that determine when the
watermark appears during video playbacks and the length of time it is
visible.

name: set
desc: Uploads a watermark image to YouTube and sets it for a channel.

name: WatermarksResource
desc:
A watermark resource identifies an image that displays during playbacks of a
specified channel's videos. You can also specify a target channel to which
the image will link as well as timing details that determine when the
watermark appears during video playbacks and the length of time it is
visible.

name: imageBytes
desc: The size of the watermark image, in bytes.

name: imageUrl
desc:
The URL for the channel's watermark image. YouTube will generate this URL
and return it in the API response to a watermark.set request.

name: position
desc:
The position object encapsulates information about the spatial position
within the video where the watermark image will display.

name: targetChannelId
desc: The YouTube channel ID of the channel that the watermark image links to.

name: timing
desc:
The timing object encapsulates information about the time during a video
playback when a channel's watermark image will display.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

though a video stream may be bound to more than one broadcast.

name: YoutubeStreamCommand
desc:
A liveStream resource contains information about the video stream that you
are transmitting to YouTube. The stream provides the content that will be
broadcast to YouTube users. Once created, a liveStream resource can be bound
to one or more liveBroadcast resources.

name: YoutubeSubscriptionsCommand
desc:
A Subscription resource contains information about a YouTube user
subscription. A subscription notifies a user when new videos are added to a
channel or when another user takes one of several actions on YouTube, such
as uploading a video, rating a video, or commenting on a video.

name: YoutubeTransitionBroadcastCommand
desc:
Changes the status of a YouTube live broadcast and initiates any processes
associated with the new status. For example, when you transition a
broadcast's status to testing, YouTube starts to transmit video to that
broadcast's monitor stream. Before calling this method, you should confirm
that the value of the status.streamStatus property for the stream bound to
your broadcast is active.
